name: ctpV
function: P-type ATPase pump involved in metal efflux, potentially acting as a copper efflux pump (PMID 21925112, PMID 40196583).  Also described as a cation transporter (PMID 10500215).
drug_susc_impact: Potentially interesting targets for discovering treatments against mycobacteria (PMID 21925112). Involved in conferring cadmium tolerance, potentially affecting drug susceptibility (PMID 40196583). Mutants lacking CtpV are more susceptible to copper (PMID 22361385).
infection_impact: Intraphagosomal zinc accumulation and impaired intracellular growth (PMID 21925112). Contributes to intracellular survival during infection (PMID 21925112).  Altered virulence patterns in vivo (PMID 21925112).  Unique immune response profile, generating a robust Th1-biased T-cell response in mice (PMID 39663556). Essential for survival during infection by conferring multi-metal resistance (PMID 40196583). Part of a multipronged system to balance intracellular copper levels (PMID 22361385).
